sector_summary: The Energy, Healthcare, and Industrials sectors show medium confidence with positive signals, while Technology also has medium confidence but faces volatility. Consumer Discretionary and Communication Services are sectors to avoid due to weak performance and negative news flow. Conflicts exist in the Financials and Clean Energy sectors, indicating diverging signals that warrant caution.
